# Cognis Group | AI Consulting, Strategy & Agent Engineering

> Cognis Group builds, deploys, and governs AI systems — agents, chatbots, workflows, governance frameworks, and workforce training. Lagos-headquartered, globally engaged.

## About

Cognis Group is a Lagos-headquartered AI consulting and engineering firm. We build, deploy, and govern AI systems for enterprises across Africa and globally. Every engagement leaves the organization permanently more capable — we do not sell dependency.

**Quod Tango Muto — What we touch, we change.**

## Core capabilities

1. **AI Strategy & Advisory** — AI readiness assessments, use case identification, and deployment roadmaps.
2. **AI Agent Building & Deployment** — Design and deployment of AI agents, chatbots, and automated workflows — built on your stack, governed by your rules.
3. **AI Training & Workforce Development** — Programs for C-suite to frontline staff on AI tools, thinking, and governance.
4. **AI Governance & Risk** — Policy frameworks, audit structures, and compliance with local regulations (NDPA, CBN guidance) and global standards (ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act).
5. **ML & Data Intelligence** — Custom ML models, data pipelines, and predictive systems — production-grade from day one.
6. **Digital Transformation** — End-to-end modernization of legacy systems with intelligence embedded throughout.

## Where African context meets AI engineering

Our edge is deep African market knowledge combined with global AI engineering capability. International clients engaging with African operations get context no Western firm can authentically replicate. African enterprises get senior engineering without the overhead of remote Western consultancies.

We work remotely, on-site, and through hybrid engagement models.

## Our operating principles

- **We deploy, we don't theorize.** Every engagement leaves the organization permanently more capable.
- **We don't replace people with AI — we make people extraordinary with AI.**
- **Lagos-headquartered. Globally engaged. What we touch, we change.**

## Frequently asked

**What does Cognis Group actually do?** We build, deploy, and govern AI systems — agents, chatbots, workflows, governance frameworks, and training programmes — across six practice areas.

**Where is Cognis Group based?** Headquartered in Lagos, registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission. Sister entity in the United States.

**What industries do you serve?** Enterprises, government agencies, banks, telcos, and fintechs across Africa, plus international organizations operating in or expanding into Africa.

**How do you approach AI governance?** We build policy frameworks, audit structures, and compliance systems aligned with both NDPA/CBN guidance and global standards (ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act). We design governance before deployment, not after.

**How does a Lagos-based firm work with international clients?** Deep African market knowledge combined with global AI engineering. We work remotely, on-site, and through hybrid engagement models.

**What makes Cognis different?** We are an African firm by design, not a Western practice with an Africa strategy bolted on. Every engagement leaves the organization permanently more capable.
